app.title: FIRE Calculators
app.description: Private, offline-first FIRE (Financial Independence, Retire Early) calculators

standard.title: Standard FIRE Calculator
standard.description: The classic 25x expenses rule — calculate your "magic number" for full financial independence.

coast.title: Coast FIRE Calculator
coast.description: Find how much you need now so compound growth does the rest — then coast to retirement.

lean.title: Lean FIRE Calculator
lean.description: Achieve FI faster with a minimalist lifestyle — perfect for frugal-minded planners.

fat.title: Fat FIRE Calculator
fat.description: Retire without compromise — calculate FI while maintaining a comfortable lifestyle.

barista.title: Barista FIRE Calculator
barista.description: Blend part-time work with portfolio income — retire from corporate life earlier.

withdrawal.title: Withdrawal Rate Calculator
withdrawal.description: Test your portfolio's longevity — find your safe withdrawal rate for any scenario.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Gap Calculator
healthcare.description: Estimate healthcare costs between early retirement and Medicare eligibility.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator is for educational purposes only. It is not intended to be, and should not be construed as, financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. Please consult with a qualified financial advisor, tax professional, or other appropriate professional.
